command_help_desc: Display help message with all commands, active skills, and subagents
command_ants_desc: List registered subagents and their capabilities
command_disable_skill_desc: Disable a global skill in the active session
command_enable_skill_desc: Enable a previously disabled global skill
command_enable_agent_desc: Enable a previously disabled colony subagent
command_reload_desc: Reload all workspace skills and subagents
command_save_desc: Save active conversation history to a file (usage: /save name)
command_load_desc: Load conversation history from a file (usage: /load name)
